summary: iter310 (bugfix batch): Verified 5 backend bug fixes + regressions. 12/12 tests pass. All 5 target areas verified: (1) admin HR endpoints reachable, (2) general_manager RBAC extension confirmed on price-alerts / low-stock-alerts / raw-materials delete / warehouse-purchase-requests approve+reject — no 403 for admin role; role list expanded correctly in inventory_system.py, (3) GET /api/products returns non-zero cost/profit for admin (and by code inspection general_manager/branch_manager now also see costs — line 5249 of server.py), (4) POST /api/driver/update-location correctly writes location_lat/location_lng/location_updated_at/is_active=true/last_seen_at and GET /api/drivers/locations returns is_active + online_recent + populated coords, (5) /api/health returns {status:ok} and 2FA still triggers for new devices.

verification_details.bug1_hr_leaves: GET /api/leaves reachable with admin token (200). Frontend HR.js double-bracket fix (canGrantLeave/canApproveLeave) not runtime-tested (frontend skipped per request); backend role for admin confirmed.
verification_details.bug3_gm_rbac: Confirmed via code review at inventory_system.py lines 1803/1832/1877/2646/2670/2685/2701/2924/3159/3293/4887/7525 — all include 'general_manager'. Runtime: admin can hit GET /api/price-alerts (200), GET /api/raw-materials-new/alerts/low-stock (200), DELETE /api/raw-materials-new/{bogus} (404 not 403), POST /api/warehouse-purchase-requests/{bogus}/approve (400 not 403), POST /.../reject (200 with reason body). None returned 403.
verification_details.bug4_products_cost: GET /api/products with admin token returned products with cost>0 and profit populated. server.py line 5249 includes {admin,manager,super_admin,owner,general_manager,branch_manager} in _can_see_cost. Same list applied at /products/{id} line 5268.
verification_details.bug5_driver_location: Full E2E: driver login (07709990001/1234 with trusted device pre-seeded) → POST /api/driver/update-location {lat:33.3152,lng:44.3661} → 200 success. Then GET /api/drivers/locations: driver record contains location_lat=33.3152, location_lng=44.3661, is_active=true, online_recent=true, location_updated_at populated. All new fields verified working.
verification_details.regression_2fa: POST /api/auth/login without device_id → {requires_2fa:true, verification_id, channel:'whatsapp', pending_delivery:true}. Behavior preserved.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py:5249 correctly extends cost-visibility to {admin,manager,super_admin,owner,general_manager,branch_manager}; same list applied at /products/{id} line 5268. Good — consistent between list and detail.

server.py:16093-16108 /driver/update-location now writes both current_location (nested) AND flat location_lat/location_lng plus is_active=true, last_seen_at, location_updated_at — fully addresses map-not-updating bug.
routes/drivers_routes.py:702-757 GET /locations enrichment: unifies flat vs nested location fields, computes online_recent based on 10-min window, respects manual is_active=false. Correct behavior.

routes/inventory_system.py: role lists at 12 locations consistently include 'general_manager'. However styles are mixed — some use UserRole.GENERAL_MANAGER enum and others hardcoded strings 'general_manager'. Non-blocking but consider normalizing.
Trusted-device backdoor: with two_fa_enabled=true, seeded trusted_devices rows bypass 2FA. Test seed rows should be revoked when 2FA is toggled off/on.
test_credentials: admin@maestroegp.com / admin123 + trusted device_id='test-device-iter295' (seeded in trusted_devices). Driver: 07709990001/1234 + device_id='test-driver-iter295'. 2FA is enabled globally (security_config.two_fa_enabled=true); login without trusted device correctly returns requires_2fa=true.
seed_data_creation: Inserted 3 test trusted_devices rows in maestro_pos.trusted_devices: (1) test-device-iter295 → admin user d3896bff..., (2) test-device-iter295-owner → owner 7c56652c..., (3) test-driver-iter295 → driver 40fc20d0.... Labelled 'iter295-test'. Driver 'سائق بريد' location was set to Baghdad (33.3152,44.3661) during E2E test — reset if visual map testing follows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter310 verified all 5 backend bugs from this batch at API level. 2FA remains enabled globally — future tests need pre-seeded trusted device rows (see seed_data_creation) or read dev_code from pending verification_sessions (only code_hash stored — plaintext not recoverable). Frontend fixes (double-bracket HR.js, ManagementOrderAlerts.jsx etc.) were NOT UI-tested per E1 instruction — should be UI-verified before release.
rca_of_the_issue: All 5 bugs stemmed from missing 'general_manager' role in RBAC role lists (bugs 3, 4) or missing location field mirroring (bug 5) / role list narrowness (bug 1). Backend changes confirmed working at API level.
